title: Introduction and Background
objective: Contextualize automated literature review as an emerging research area and establish the scope of this comparative survey

title: Methodological Approaches
objective: Compare the spectrum of methods employed—RAG-based, NLP pipeline, and hybrid approaches—and evaluate their architectural differences

title: Evaluation Metrics and Reporting Practices
objective: Analyze metric heterogeneity (ROUGE-L, F1, precision, AUC) across studies and identify inconsistencies that hinder cross-study comparison

title: Language Coverage and Cross-lingual Generalization
objective: Assess the English-language dominance in current benchmarks and review evidence for multilingual capability claims

title: Evidence Grounding and Verification
objective: Examine how systems ground their claims in source evidence and evaluate the reliability of evidence chains in performance reporting

title: Synthesis and Open Research Problems
objective: Integrate findings across sections to articulate consolidated research gaps and future directions for the field
